response: The "Virtual Choir"-noted conductor who has created works for the Austin-based ensemble Conspirare is Eric Whitacre. He is known for his "Virtual Choir" projects, which bring individual voices from around the world together into an online choir. Eric Whitacre has commissioned works from composers including David Lang, Tarik O'Regan, and others, and he has been associated with Conspirare through his contributions to their musical projects.
